## Attack Type

- [ ] Jailbreak
- [ ] Prompt Injection
- [ ] System Prompt Extraction
- [ ] Training Data Leakage
- [ ] Model Extraction
- [ ] Adversarial Input
- [ ] Roleplay Bypass
- [ ] Multi-turn Manipulation
- [ ] Tool/Function Abuse
- [ ] Other: ___

## Severity (your assessment)

- [ ] Critical
- [ ] High
- [ ] Medium
- [ ] Low

## Ease of Use

- [ ] Trivial (no skill required)
- [ ] Easy
- [ ] Moderate
- [ ] Complex
- [ ] Expert only

## Effectiveness

- [ ] Excellent (works reliably 90%+)
- [ ] Great (75–90%)
- [ ] Good (50–75%)
- [ ] Normal (25–50%)
- [ ] Low (<25%)

---

## Patch Status

- [ ] Active (still works as of today)
- [ ] Partial (mitigated but not fully patched)
- [ ] Patched (vendor has fixed)
- [ ] Unknown
